hooks.command: node -e "const f=JSON.parse(process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT||'{}'); const p=(f.file_path||'').replace(/\\\\/g,'/'); if(p.endsWith('.env')||p.includes('.env.')){process.stdout.write('BLOCK: .env files contain API secrets and must not be edited');process.exit(2)}"

node -e "const f=JSON.parse(process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT||'{}'); const p=(f.file_path||'').replace(/\\\\/g,'/'); if(p.endsWith('package-lock.json')){process.stdout.write('BLOCK: Do not edit lock files directly — use npm install');process.exit(2)}"

node -e "const f=JSON.parse(process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT||'{}'); const p=(f.file_path||'').replace(/\\\\/g,'/'); if(p.endsWith('products.json')&&!p.includes('custom-products')){process.stdout.write('BLOCK: products.json is auto-generated by Printify sync — run npm run sync instead');process.exit(2)}"
